title: Trump Overstepped Authority on Tariffs, Says Nevada Attorney General
description: Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford says President Donald Trump overstepped his authority when it came to tariffs. He says he was not surprised by the Supreme Court's ruling.  (Source: Bloomberg)
content: Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford says President Donald Trump overstepped his authority when it came to tariffs. He says he was not surprised by the Supreme Court's ruling.  (Source: Bloomberg)
